name: Calli Table Lamp (Set of 2) - 28 Inch Height - TBL4161 - Pink/White - Safavieh
description: Illuminate your space with the calli table lamp in pink and white. This elegant lamp adds a soft glow to any room while serving as a stylish accent. Its charming blend of pink and white makes it a versatile choice for various decor themes. The lamp features a beautifully crafted base that supports a classic shade design, offering both functionality and aesthetic appeal. With its timeless design, the calli table lamp can effortlessly complement your living room, bedroom, or office. The subtle color combination fosters a calming atmosphere, perfect for relaxation or focus. Ideal for those seeking to enhance their home decor with a touch of elegance and charm, the calli table lamp is a delightful addition to your lighting collection. Discover how this exquisite piece can transform your space with its graceful presence and serene illumination.
